productDisplayName: Nike Men Polo Club Blue T-shirt
description: Style Note Stay fresh and stylish this summer in this nike T-shirt. Team it with training pants and sports shoes for a high performance outfit when you're exercising, or wear it with jeans for a relaxed weekend look. Product Details Light blue polo T-shirt, has a spread ribbed collar, two button placket, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, vents at hem, logo on left chest Material and Care100% cotton pique knit Machine wash cold with like colours Do not dry clean or bleach Tumble dry low Warm iron do not iron on print/decoration
